name: language-tags

metadata.name: language-tags
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: This project is a Python version of the language-tags Javascript project.

documentation:
# IANA Language Tags for Python

```{image} https://badge.fury.io/py/language-tags.png
:target: http://badge.fury.io/py/language-tags
```

```{image} https://app.travis-ci.com/OnroerendErfgoed/language-tags.png?branch=develop
:target: https://app.travis-ci.com/OnroerendErfgoed/language-tags
```

```{image} https://coveralls.io/repos/OnroerendErfgoed/language-tags/badge.png
:target: https://coveralls.io/r/OnroerendErfgoed/language-tags
```

```{image} https://readthedocs.org/projects/language-tags/badge/?version=latest
:target: https://readthedocs.org/projects/language-tags/?badge=latest
```

This Python API offers a way to validate and lookup languages tags.

## Standard

It is based on [BCP 47](http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47) ([RFC 5646](http://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5646)) and the latest [IANA language subtag registry](http://www.iana.org/assignments/language-subtag-registry).

This project will be updated as the standards change.

Language-tags 1.0.0 only supports Python 3, for Python 2 support, please use language-tags 0.5.0.

## JSON data

See the [language-subtag-registry](https://github.com/mattcg/language-subtag-registry) project for the underlying JSON data.

## Javascript version

This project is a Python version of the [language-tags](https://github.com/mattcg/language-tags) Javascript project.

modules.name: language_tags.Subtag
documentation: -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

methods.name: language_tags.Subtag.Subtag.__init__
documentation:
A subtag is a part of the hyphen-separated {class}`language_tags.Tag.Tag`.

```
param str subtag

subtage.

param str type

can be 'language', 'extlang', 'script', 'region' or 'variant'.

return

raise Error

Checks for Subtag.ERR_NONEXISTENT and Subtag.ERR_TAG.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Subtag.Subtag.type
documentation:
Get the subtag type.

```
return

string -- either 'language', 'extlang', 'script', 'region' or 'variant'.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Subtag.Subtag.description
documentation:
Get the subtag description.

```
return

list of description strings.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Subtag.Subtag.preferred
documentation:
Get the preferred subtag.

```
return

preferred  if exists, otherwise None.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Subtag.Subtag.format
documentation:
Get the subtag code conventional format according to RFC 5646 section 2.1.1.

```
return

string -- subtag code conventional format.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Subtag.Subtag.script
documentation:
Get the language's default script of the subtag (RFC 5646 section 3.1.9)

```
return

string -- the language's default script.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Subtag.Subtag.scope
documentation:
Get the subtag scope.

```
return

string subtag scope if exists, otherwise None.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Subtag.Subtag.deprecated
documentation:
Get the deprecation date.

```
return

deprecation date as string if subtag is deprecated, otherwise None.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Subtag.Subtag.added
documentation:
Get the date when the subtag was added to the registry.

```
return

date (as string) when the subtag was added to the registry.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Subtag.Subtag.comments
documentation:
Get the comments of the subtag.

```
return

list of comments. The return list can be empty.
```

modules.name: language_tags.tags
documentation: -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

methods.name: language_tags.tags.tags.tag
documentation:
Get a {class}`language_tags.Tag.Tag` of a string (hyphen-separated) tag.

```
param str tag

(hyphen-separated) tag.

return

.
```

methods.name: language_tags.tags.tags.check
documentation:
Check if a string (hyphen-separated) tag is valid.

```
param str tag

(hyphen-separated) tag.

return

bool -- True if valid.
```

methods.name: language_tags.tags.tags.types
documentation:
Get the types of a subtag string (excludes redundant and grandfathered).

```
param str subtag

subtag.

return

list of types. The return list can be empty.
```

methods.name: language_tags.tags.tags.subtags
documentation:
Get a list of existing {class}`language_tags.Subtag.Subtag` objects given the input subtag(s).

```
param subtags

string subtag or list of string subtags.

return

a list of existing  objects. The return list can be empty.
```

methods.name: language_tags.tags.tags.filter
documentation:
Get a list of non-existing string subtag(s) given the input string subtag(s).

```
param subtags

string subtag or a list of string subtags.

return

list of non-existing string subtags. The return list can be empty.
```

methods.name: language_tags.tags.tags.search
documentation:
> Gets a list of {class}`language_tags.Subtag.Subtag` objects where the description matches.
>
> ```
> param description
>
> a string or compiled regular expression. For
> ```

example: `search(re.compile(r'[0-9]{4}'))` if the
: > description of the returned subtag must contain four contiguous numerical digits.

  ```
  type description

  str or RegExp

  param all

  If set on True grandfathered and redundant tags will be included in the return
  list.

  type all

  bool, optional

  return

  list of  objects each including the description.
  The return list can be empty.
  ```

methods.name: language_tags.tags.tags.description
documentation:
Gets a list of descriptions given the tag.

```
param str tag

(hyphen-separated) tag.

return

list of string descriptions. The return list can be empty.
```

methods.name: language_tags.tags.tags.languages
documentation:
Get a list of {class}`language_tags.Subtag.Subtag` objects given the string macrolanguage.

```
param string macrolanguage

subtag macrolanguage.

return

a list of the macrolanguage  objects.

raise Exception

if the macrolanguage does not exists.
```

methods.name: language_tags.tags.tags.type
documentation:
Get a {class}`language_tags.Subtag.Subtag` by subtag and type. Can be None if not exists.

```
param str subtag

subtag.

param str type

type of the subtag.

return

 if exists, otherwise None.
```

methods.name: language_tags.tags.tags.language
documentation:
Get a language {class}`language_tags.Subtag.Subtag` of the subtag string.

```
param str subtag

subtag.

return

language  if exists, otherwise None.
```

methods.name: language_tags.tags.tags.region
documentation:
Get a region {class}`language_tags.Subtag.Subtag` of the subtag string.

```
param str subtag

subtag.

return

region  if exists, otherwise None.
```

methods.name: language_tags.tags.tags.date
documentation:
Get the file date of the underlying data as a string.

```
return

date as string (for example: '2014-03-27').
```

modules.name: language_tags.Tag
documentation: -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

methods.name: language_tags.Tag.Tag.__init__
documentation:
Tags for Identifying Languages based on BCP 47 (RFC 5646) and the latest IANA language subtag registry.

:param str tag: (hyphen-separated) tag.

methods.name: language_tags.Tag.Tag.preferred
documentation:
Get the preferred {class}`language_tags.Tag.Tag` of the deprecated or redundant tag.

```
return

preferred  if the deprecated or redundant tag has one, otherwise None.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Tag.Tag.type
documentation:
Get the type of the tag (either grandfathered, redundant or tag see RFC 5646 section 2.2.8.).

```
return

string -- type of the tag.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Tag.Tag.added
documentation:
Get the date string of grandfathered or redundant tag when it was added to the registry.

```
return

added date string if the deprecated or redundant tag has one, otherwise None.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Tag.Tag.deprecated
documentation:
Get the deprecation date of grandfathered or redundant tag if the tag is deprecated.

```
return

deprecation date string if the deprecated or redundant tag has one, otherwise None.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Tag.Tag.descriptions
documentation:
Get the list of descriptions of the grandfathered or redundant tag.

```
return

list of descriptions. If no descriptions available, it returns an empty list.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Tag.Tag.format
documentation:
Get format according to algorithm defined in RFC 5646 section 2.1.1.

```
return

formatted tag string.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Tag.Tag.subtags
documentation:
Get the {class}`language_tags.Subtag.Subtag` objects of the tag.

```
return

list of  objects that are part of the tag.
The return list can be empty.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Tag.Tag.language
documentation:
Get the language {class}`language_tags.Subtag.Subtag` of the tag.

```
return

language  that is part of the tag.
The return can be None.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Tag.Tag.region
documentation:
Get the region {class}`language_tags.Subtag.Subtag` of the tag.

```
return

region  that is part of the tag.
The return can be None.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Tag.Tag.script
documentation:
Get the script {class}`language_tags.Subtag.Subtag` of the tag.

```
return

script  that is part of the tag.
The return can be None.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Tag.Tag.valid
documentation:
Checks whether the tag is valid.

```
return

Bool -- True if valid otherwise False.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Tag.Tag.errors
documentation:
Get the errors of the tag.
If invalid then the list will consist of errors containing each a code and message explaining the error.
Each error also refers to the respective (sub)tag(s).

```
return

list of errors of the tag. If the tag is valid, it returns an empty list.
```

methods.name: language_tags.Tag.Tag.error
documentation:
Get the {class}`language_tags.Tag.Tag.Error` of a specific Tag error code.
The error creates a message explaining the error.
It also refers to the respective (sub)tag(s).

```
param int code

a Tag error error:

1 = Tag.ERR_DEPRECATED

2 = Tag.ERR_NO_LANGUAGE

3 = Tag.ERR_UNKNOWN,

4 = Tag.ERR_TOO_LONG

5 = Tag.ERR_EXTRA_REGION

6 = Tag.ERR_EXTRA_EXTLANG

7 = Tag.ERR_EXTRA_SCRIPT,

8 = Tag.ERR_DUPLICATE_VARIANT

9 = Tag.ERR_WRONG_ORDER

10 = Tag.ERR_SUPPRESS_SCRIPT,

11 = Tag.ERR_SUBTAG_DEPRECATED

12 = Tag.ERR_EXTRA_LANGUAGE

param subtag

string (sub)tag or list of string (sub)tags creating the error.

return

An exception class containing: a Tag error input code, the derived message with the given (sub)tag(s).
input
```
